title: Diagnostic: Polar.DB point lookup, missing lookup, category scan
description: Polar.DB-specific diagnostic experiment. It isolates existing-key point lookup, missing-key point lookup, and scan/filter by category on one million person records. This is where Polar.DB version comparison belongs.

dataset.notes: Records contain id, name, age, category100, isPopular. category100 = id % 100. isPopular is reserved for future cache/popular experiments and is not cached here.

workload.notes: Measures existing GetByKey, missing GetByKey, and scan/filter category lookup. Cached and uncached metrics are not mixed.

fault.notes: No fault injection. This experiment isolates search behavior.

fairness.notes: All Polar.DB targets use the same generated data, deterministic point keys, deterministic categories, and no cache.

runs.notes: Search diagnostic profile. CLI may override.
